summary: Tested SourceHQ backend (17 pytest tests, 100% pass) and frontend (landing, directory, agent detail, sign-in, buyer dashboard, agent profile edit, admin). All critical backend flows working including AI match (Claude), auth via Bearer token, role enforcement, messaging, reviews, admin verify/unverify. Frontend renders all pages correctly with cookie-based auth injection.

integration_issues.issue: Could not reliably auto-fill form from test script — inputs lack name attributes and data-testid for title/description/category/quantity/budget/timeline. Backend POST /api/rfqs works fine (verified via pytest). Likely a test selector issue, but adding data-testid would make it robust.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes on NewRFQ form inputs (title, description, category, quantity, budget_usd, timeline, submit) and on other interactive elements (sign-in button, agent cards, verify/unverify buttons, profile edit inputs) for reliable E2E automation.
Consider rate-limiting/error surfacing for AI match endpoint — currently works but fallback path isn't user-visible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/auth/session trusts external session_token from Emergent OAuth as the app's own session_token. This is fine but worth noting for security — token lifetime relies on 7-day app-side expiry.
server.py: /api/rfqs/{id} has no authorization check — any authenticated user can read any RFQ including quotes. If buyer confidentiality matters, restrict to RFQ owner + agents who quoted + admin.
server.py: /api/messages has no validation that recipient_id exists. Stale recipient = orphan thread.
server.py: /api/agents/{agent_id}/reviews allows unlimited reviews per buyer-per-agent (no dedup). Could be spammed to inflate ratings.
server.py: Filename has all routes in single file (~560 lines) — still manageable but consider splitting by resource if it grows.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; currently Kubernetes ingress likely handles origin, but set explicit origin list for production.
test_credentials: Emergent Google OAuth only — seeded test users directly in MongoDB per /app/auth_testing.md. Admin email admin@sourcehq.test auto-promoted.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 test sessions (buyer/agent/admin) via mongosh for frontend cookie injection; pytest fixtures create+teardown TEST_ prefixed users/agents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green (17/17). Frontend functional — only minor test automation gap due to missing data-testid on form inputs. 6 pre-seeded agents verified. Admin dashboard renders stats correctly (10 users, 7 agents, 5 verified, 1 RFQ, 1 quote after test run).
